name: Lyt Pod Manager
author: Alexandru Mares
description: Mesh-boundary coloring + write-permission badges over the Lyt pod-map vault. Activates only on vaults with vault.kind=pod-map in .lyt/vault.yon. Read-only enhancement — the pod-map vault renders fully in stock Obsidian without this plugin (degrade-to-baseline contract).
_post_alpha: community-store submission scheduled (the ratified default condition 5; manifest semver synced across wizard-install and community-store distribution surfaces)
